  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gemma-3-12b/expressions/compound_literals_6/sample_001/target.rs:12:11
   |
12 |     if (a == b) != 0 && (a == b) != 1 {
   |           ^^ no implementation for `[u8] == str`
   |
   = help: the trait `PartialEq<str>` is not implemented for `[u8]`
   = help: the following other types implement trait `PartialEq<Rhs>`:
             `&[u8]` implements `PartialEq<ByteStr>`
             `&[u8]` implements `PartialEq<ByteString>`
             `[u8]` implements `PartialEq<ByteStr>`
             `[u8]` implements `PartialEq<ByteString>`
   = note: required for `&[u8]` to implement `PartialEq<&str>`
